statusLine.command: jq -r --argjson now "$(date +%s)" '((.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // $now) - $now) as $s5 | ((.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // $now) - $now) as $s7 | "[\(.model.display_name)] ctx: \(.context_window.used_percentage // 0)% | limits: \(.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // 0 | floor)%(\($s5 / 3600 | floor)h\($s5 % 3600 / 60 | floor)m)/\(.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // 0 | floor)%(\($s7 / 86400 | floor)d\($s7 % 86400 / 3600 | floor)h) | cost: $\((.cost.total_cost_usd // 0) * 10000 | floor / 10000)"'
